name: Nha Harn The Series
original_name: หน่าฮ่าน เดอะ ซีรีส์
overview: This is the story of chaotic teenagers whose love for dancing Nha Harn is at the heart of their existence. Yuphin must choose between two guys: one she can't forget and another who's extremely good. Sawan is a Mor-Lam. Singto sells amulets at the market fair.

trailers.title: [Trailer] หน่าฮ่านเดอะซีรีส์
